Shot by Andrius

Andrius Šimkus — Professional Photographer

I’m Andrius Šimkus, a professional photographer based in Lithuania. I specialize in concert, event, sports, portrait, and food photography—capturing authentic moments with clean, modern aesthetics.

My work blends minimal composition with bold atmosphere. Whether tracking fast action, documenting an event, or crafting portraits and food sets, I aim for images that feel intentional, timeless, editorial.

Explore the collections and reach out if you'd like to work together.

View Collections Contact
